data.prompt: Give me a list of top used 10 icons in any saas project, only the name of the icon, no description, a word per line

data.inputPrompt: Give me a list of top used 10 icons in any saas project, only the name of the icon, no description, a word per line
data.outputText:
Dashboard
Settings
Search
User
Bell
Chart
Plus
Help
Menu
Calendar

data.prompt:
I want to generate this list of icons:
Dashboard
Settings
Search
User
Bell
Chart
Plus
Help
Menu
Calendar
But the style should look like from the images I attaches, I need for each icon a prompt line. Add to the prompt something like "style should look like the images attached". Also add the name of the icon into the sentence and dont use ** to separate the icon

data.inputPrompt:
I want to generate this list of icons:
Dashboard
Settings
Search
User
Bell
Chart
Plus
Help
Menu
Calendar
But the style should look like from the images I attaches, I need for each icon a prompt line. Add to the prompt something like "style should look like the images attached". Also add the name of the icon into the sentence and dont use ** to separate the icon
data.outputText:
Here are the prompt lines for each icon, designed to match the glossy 3D aesthetic, vibrant blue and lime green color palette, and translucent glass textures seen in your images:

1. A 3D icon for Dashboard featuring a glossy blue interface panel with floating lime green data widgets and translucent glass layers, style should look like the images attached.

2. A 3D icon for Settings depicting a smooth rounded blue gear interlocked with a smaller lime green translucent cog, style should look like the images attached.

3. A 3D icon for Search showing a thick glossy blue magnifying glass with a translucent frosted glass lens and a lime green handle, style should look like the images attached.

4. A 3D icon for User featuring a rounded blue avatar silhouette floating in front of a lime green glossy circle with soft studio lighting, style should look like the images attached.

5. A 3D icon for Bell designed as a vibrant blue notification bell with a lime green clapper and a translucent glass glow, style should look like the images attached.

6. A 3D icon for Chart showing three-dimensional glossy blue and lime green rising bars on a translucent circular platform, style should look like the images attached.

7. A 3D icon for Plus consisting of a thick blue cross with rounded edges and a lime green translucent shadow effect, style should look like the images attached.

8. A 3D icon for Help featuring a glossy blue question mark floating inside a translucent lime green sphere with a polished finish, style should look like the images attached.

9. A 3D icon for Menu showing three thick glossy blue horizontal bars with rounded lime green accents and a soft 3D depth, style should look like the images attached.

10. A 3D icon for Calendar depicting a blue square block with a lime green page marker and translucent glass binder rings, style should look like the images attached.
